Hemoglobin A1C (HbA1c) Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/hemoglobin-a1c-hba1c-test/ 
Hemoglobin A1C (HbA1c) Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a hemoglobin A1C (HbA1C) test? 
A hemoglobin A1C (HbA1C) test is a blood test that shows your average level of blood glucose , also called blood sugar, over the past two to three months.
Glucose is a type of sugar in your blood that comes from the foods you eat. Your cells use glucose for energy. A hormone called insulin helps glucose g
